subtitle: Foot pain — location not pinpointed

strava_risk_triggers.risk_note: General foot pain is often the first sign of shoe wear or mileage issues

mild.description: General foot soreness or fatigue after runs
mild.can_run_note: Yes — try to identify specific location using this app
why: General foot fatigue from running volume
relief: Foot rolling with a tennis or lacrosse ball
Toe spreads and foot doming exercises
Check shoe mileage — replace every 600–800 km
prevention: Use this app to identify specific location for targeted advice
Rotate between two pairs of shoes

moderate.description: Consistent foot pain affecting your running
moderate.can_run_note: Easy runs only — identify specific location
why: Specific foot structure under stress — needs identification
relief: Use this app to narrow down heel, arch, ball of foot or toe
prevention: Address root cause once specific structure identified

why: Undiagnosed foot pathology — possible stress fracture or tendon tear
relief: Rest and see a physiotherapist or podiatrist
prevention: Return with clear diagnosis and structured plan

see_physio_if: Deep bone-like pain rather than muscle soreness
Pain at rest or at night
No improvement after 5 days of rest
